title: Up to $250,000 in Cloudflare credits
summary: Cloudflare's startup program offers infrastructure credits for eligible startups that need performance, security, and developer platform services.
eligibility: Early-stage funded startups accepted into approved startup ecosystems and partner networks.
body: Cloudflare publishes multiple startup credit tiers, including smaller entry tiers and larger partner-linked tiers. Members should verify the current tier, usage limits, and one-year expiration terms before applying.

title: Up to $10,000 in GitHub credits
summary: GitHub for Startups provides eligible partner-affiliated startups with credits that can be used across GitHub Enterprise and related products.
eligibility: Startups up to Series B that are affiliated with an approved GitHub for Startups partner and are new to GitHub Enterprise or have not been on an Enterprise plan within the past 6 months.
body: GitHub describes the offer as flexible platform credits for eligible startups. Members should verify current eligibility, partner requirements, and credit scope before applying.
